title: Polish README, RedNote, and Reddit content for publication
description: Review and finalize all three content areas from the prior gruai-marketing-launch directive for immediate publication.

in: Fix GitHub URLs (currently references gruai but repo is agent-conductor)
Finalize 6 RedNote posts for natural Chinese and copy-paste readiness
Finalize 3 Reddit posts for authentic developer voice

dod.criterion: README.md is publication-ready with correct URLs and world-class copy
6 RedNote posts ready to copy-paste with natural Chinese tone
3 Reddit posts ready to copy-paste with authentic developer voice

tasks.title: Complete README rewrite — marketing-grade with screenshots, pipeline explanation, research references
tasks.user_scenario: A developer visiting the GitHub repo sees a world-class README that immediately explains gruai's autonomous AI company vision, shows screenshots/GIF, explains the pipeline with references to harness/context engineering research, and positions the CEO experience as the core value prop.
tasks.scope: COMPLETE REWRITE of README.md. CEO rejected initial polish — wants fundamentally different README with screenshots, pipeline explanation, harness engineering references, CEO experience narrative, custom agents section, and game UI. Deferred to new directive.

dod.criterion: Hero GIF (demo.gif) at top + at least 2 screenshots (dashboard-full.png, game-office.png) embedded
Pipeline explained with diagram showing triage→plan→challenge→audit→build→review→completion flow
References to OpenAI harness engineering, Anthropic building effective agents, with table mapping concepts to gruai implementation
CEO experience section — 45 min/week, /scout, /directive, /report workflow
Custom agents section — markdown files, personalities, C-suite + ephemeral engineers
Positioned as 'designed for depth not speed' — agents challenge, brainstorm, push back
GitHub clone URL points to https://github.com/andrew-yangy/agent-conductor.git
npm install command is accurate (npm install -g gru-ai && gru-ai)
Copy reads naturally — not like AI-generated marketing material

tasks.title: Finalize 6 RedNote (小红书) posts for publication
tasks.user_scenario: CEO copies each post directly into 小红书 without any editing — the Chinese is natural, hooks are compelling, and CTAs vary.
tasks.scope: Review the 6 draft posts in posts.md. Fix GitHub URLs to agent-conductor. Vary the CTAs. Ensure Chinese reads naturally and follows 小红书 conventions.

dod.criterion: All 6 posts have correct GitHub URL (agent-conductor)
CTAs are varied — not all ending with the same npm install + follow formula
Chinese is natural 小红书 tone, not machine-translated
Each post is clearly separated and ready to copy-paste

tasks.title: Finalize 3 Reddit posts for publication
tasks.user_scenario: CEO copies each post directly into the appropriate subreddit without editing — tone matches each community, links work, and content sounds like a developer sharing.
tasks.scope: Review the 3 draft posts. Fix GitHub URLs to agent-conductor. Shorten titles. Ensure tone matches subreddits.

dod.criterion: All 3 posts have correct GitHub URL (agent-conductor)
r/ChatGPTCoding title is under 80 characters
Each post tone matches its target subreddit's culture
All feature claims are accurate against current codebase
